title: Add UIContext, WidgetDescriptor schemas and UserContext for AI chatbot

commits.author: Roman Rakus
commits.message: feat(gen-ai): refactor widgets polymorphism and enhance OpenAPI spec

commits.author: Roman Rakus
commits.message: feat(gen-ai): add support for filters for visualizations

diff:
--- a/gooddata-afm-client.json
+++ b/gooddata-afm-client.json
+      "DashboardContext": { "properties": { "id": {...}, "widgets": { "$ref": "WidgetDescriptor" } }, "required": ["id","widgets"] },
+      "InsightWidgetDescriptor": { "properties": { "filters": {...}, "resultId": {...}, "title": {...}, "visualizationId": {...}, "widgetId": {...} }, "required": ["title","visualizationId","widgetId"] },
+      "ObjectReference": { "properties": { "id": {...}, "type": { "enum": ["WIDGET","METRIC","ATTRIBUTE","DASHBOARD"] } }, "required": ["id","type"] },
+      "ObjectReferenceGroup": { "properties": { "context": { "$ref": "ObjectReference" }, "objects": {...} }, "required": ["objects"] },
+      "RichTextWidgetDescriptor": { "properties": { "filters": {...}, "title": {...}, "widgetId": {...} }, "required": ["title","widgetId"] },
+      "UIContext": { "description": "Ambient UI state.", "properties": { "dashboard": { "$ref": "DashboardContext" } } },
+      "VisualizationSwitcherWidgetDescriptor": { "required": ["activeVisualizationId","title","visualizationIds","widgetId"] },
+      "WidgetDescriptor": { "discriminator": { "propertyName": "widgetType" }, ... },
       "UserContext": {
-        "description": "User context affecting AI behavior.",
+        "description": "User context with ambient UI state and explicitly referenced objects.",
+        "referencedObjects": { "items": { "$ref": "ObjectReferenceGroup" }, "type": "array" },
+        "view": { "$ref": "UIContext" }
       }
